---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include console errors if any.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Device: [e.g. desktop, iPhone 14]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17]
- Browser & version: [e.g. Chrome 120]

## Additional context
Anything else that might help (e.g. does it happen only in dark mode, only on a specific route, etc.).
